title: What'd I Say
album: Rolling Stone Magazine's 500 Greatest Songs Of All Time
why_this_song: What'd I Say by Ray Charles (1959) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 39 times; first heard in: "All right now, hey hey, all right"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "Come on baby, see about me"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "Ah! Make me feel so good (make me feel so good)"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "She knows how to shake that thing"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "She knows how to shake that thing"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: When you see me in misery
Come on baby, see about me
Now yeah yeah, all right, all right, aw play it boy
Tell me what'd I say right now

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "right" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "right" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey mama, don't you treat me wrong
See the girl with the red dress on
And I wanna know right now yeah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come and love your daddy all night long
Tell me what'd I say right now

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "What'd I Say" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "What'd I Say"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ray Charles one question about "What'd I Say", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ray Charles sobre "What'd I Say", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "What'd I Say" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "What'd I Say" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
